publishedAbstract: An ODF customer has an IP range limitation while using the ODF Multus public network. Such a customer cannot use 2 separate IP ranges (CIDRs) for host "shim" interfaces and the public Network Attachment Definition and must instead use one contiguous range. Failure to properly configure ODF Multus requirements may result in an ODF installation with some Ceph components down due to network issues. Likely component failures include mgrs, MDSes, and OSDs. Monitors are immune.
publishedTitle: Troubleshooting ODF Multus installation with a private network and OSDs down
